content:
💡 transcriber | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a private, self-hosted, and efficient solution for transcribing audio and video content from various sources, including YouTube and local files, using advanced AI models.
✨ Key Features: • YouTube & Local File Transcription • Real-Time Progress via WebSockets • Smart Media Library Management
📖 Summary: Transcriber is a self-hosted, open-source web application that leverages OpenAI Whisper and FastAPI for AI-powered audio and video transcription. It prioritizes user privacy by processing data locally and offers features like YouTube URL transcription, local file uploads, real-time progress updates via WebSockets, and a smart media library.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
